title: My Top REIT Picks For 2023
text: This is the first time in over a decade that my top picks lost money. I'm always happy to show you the proof of my stock-market wins. But I have to be just as honest about the losses.

title: 7 Investments To Avoid In 2022: The Reckoning
text: As is usual at the end of the year, many Seeking Alpha contributors are sharing their lists of where to put your money during the 2023. But not losing money with your investments is almost as important as making money.

title: 25 Upcoming Dividend Increases To Finish 2022
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 8% and a median increase of 5.4%.

title: I'm Buying These 2 Blue-Chip REITs
text: There has been a divergence between growth and value this year, and growth has massively underperformed compared to value. Many growth REITs have sold off more heavily than the average REIT this year, despite having higher quality assets and balance sheets.

title: 3 REITs With Recent Dividend Hikes to Help Survive Market Volatility
text: Ushering in good news for investors, particularly income-seeking ones, recently, a number of REITs declared their dividend hikes. Among them are O, ARE and MAA.

title: Paccar, Deere, and 10 More Companies That Raised Their Stock Dividends
text: Southwest Airlines also said it will resume paying a dividend.

title: Alexandria (ARE) Rewards Investors, Hikes Dividend by 2.5%
text: Alexandria (ARE) boosts investors' confidence with a dividend hike of 2.5%. Robust operating results, a decent financial position and a lower payout ratio make the dividend rate sustainable.

title: Alexandria Real Estate: An Undervalued Pioneer In Life Science Real Estate
text: Alexandria Real Estate is a pioneer of life science real estate, with a sizeable tenant roster of high-quality industry leaders. Favorable industry demand drivers as well as the company's leadership position in serving as one of the top trusted landlords affords Alexandria a long runway for continued earnings growth.
